# stereoViewComponents

**Instance Property**

Attributes that describe the video’s stereo components.

## Declaration

```swift
var stereoViewComponents: CMStereoViewComponents { get }
```

## Discussion

In the case of 3D or stereoscopic content, the value contains [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreMedia/CMStereoViewComponents/leftEye] and [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreMedia/CMStereoViewComponents/rightEye] components. In the case of monoscopic content, this value is [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreMedia/CMStereoViewComponents/kCMStereoView_None].

## Accessing attributes

- **projectionType**: Describes the video projection.
